findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in `dev.yml`, a dev-scoped overlay (dev = base.yml + observability.yml + dev.yml). Staging/prod compose `<env>.yml` + services.yml + observability.yml and never include dev.yml, so this service reaches dev only and is silently absent from staging/prod. It is a real runtime dependency (image ghcr.io/acme/widgetizer:1.4.0 with a Postgres connection via WIDGETIZER_DB_URL and depends_on postgres), not local-developer-experience tooling (not TLS termination, a mail catcher, or a DB admin UI).
findings.suggestion: Move `widgetizer` to `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery overlay staging/prod compose) so it reaches all deployed environments, or define it in the deployed `staging.yml`/`prod.yml` overlays. If the dev-only placement is intentional, record the decision in the decisions log rather than leaving it as a silent omission. Note `base.yml` is also dev/test-only, so it is not a valid home for a prod-reaching service.
